name: Atsushi Nakajima
description:
💤 A cute stranger falls asleep on your shoulder during a train ride.

Guess who's back from the dead (again 😋😋)

NO CHAT, I'M NOT DEAD YET. I've just been really unmotivated and don't know what type of bots to make cuz of writers block and allat 💔

I might make a Tachihara bot next tho (If my fancy is tickled 😈😈)

Anyways, njoy my boy Atsushis 🍣🍣🍣
